name: QuantumLeap Writer
simpleDescription: Writes clear, human‑like text for blogs, ads or scripts—just give it a short prompt.
description: Advanced NLP model for generating high‑coherence long‑form language with controllable tone & structure.

name: StemSplit
simpleDescription: Split a song into vocals, drums, bass and instruments.
description: High quality source separation producing clean vocal + instrumental stems using a hybrid spectrogram mask + demucs pipeline.

name: ReTune 432Hz
simpleDescription: Convert a track from 440Hz to 432Hz tuning.
description: Batch pitch-shifts audio to 432Hz reference with high fidelity formant preservation.

name: ClipMate
simpleDescription: Batch trim, normalize & auto-slice audio clips fast.
description: Utility pipeline that ingests multiple audio files, detects silence, trims heads/tails, normalizes loudness and exports consistent, ready-to-sequence clips with optional transient‑aware slicing.

name: AudioSnag
simpleDescription: Grab audio segments quickly from sources.
description: Fetches and normalizes remote audio, trimming & converting into project-ready WAV clips.

name: BeatLab Generator
simpleDescription: Generate drum loops by mood & tempo.
description: Procedural rhythm engine layering genre‑aware percussive patterns with adaptive swing & humanization.

name: AI Drum Machine
simpleDescription: Play pads & auto‑generate patterns from a text prompt.
description: Browser‑based drum machine with key‑triggered pads, sample swapping and an AI prompt box to auto sequence a beat. Generate starter grooves, then tweak live. (Demo loads once sounds folder is added.)

name: Image Synth
simpleDescription: Generate & refine images inside your web DAW.
description: Interactive diffusion canvas enabling iterative prompt + brush guided image evolution in-session.

name: Codeine Processor
simpleDescription: Apply tone shaping & clarity enhancement to mixes.
description: Multi-stage spectral processor adding harmonic polish, de-noise, stereo balance and loudness leveling for raw audio uploads.

name: Aesthetic Lab
simpleDescription: Stylize & enhance images with curated looks.
description: Chained diffusion & aesthetic scoring pipeline applying cinematic, analog or neon style transforms with adjustable intensity.

name: HalfScrew Lite
simpleDescription: Free lite version of HalfScrew for quick preview.
description: Lightweight half-speed effect offering a preview of the full HalfScrew processing chain (reduced quality & limited length).

name: Vision Pro Analyzer
simpleDescription: Extract text & objects from images fast.
description: Multimodal analyzer returning objects, OCR text blocks and aesthetic tags in one pass.

name: StyleMorph
simpleDescription: Blend two images into a stylized hybrid.
description: Perceptual style transfer + latent interpolation to morph and fuse subject & style sources.

name: Prompt Polisher
simpleDescription: Enhances rough prompts for better model output.
description: Optimizes wording, clarity & structure to improve downstream LLM or diffusion generation quality.

name: DataScout
simpleDescription: Collect & normalize web data for pipelines.
description: Distributed scraping + schema mapping & light cleaning for rapid dataset bootstrapping.

name: SpeechSculpt
simpleDescription: Clean & enhance dialogue tracks.
description: Denoise + de-reverb + dynamic leveling chain optimized for podcast / narration clarity.

name: TopicMiner
simpleDescription: Extract themes & clusters from documents.
description: Embeddings + hierarchical clustering to reveal dominant topics, tags and representative snippets.

name: Smart Summarizer
simpleDescription: Multi-length abstractive summaries on demand.
description: Retrieval‑aware summarization producing bullet, short, or deep narrative variants per request.

name: Sentiment Sensei
simpleDescription: Batch sentiment + intent tagging.
description: Transformer ensemble scoring polarity, intent & subjectivity with confidence metrics for each record.

name: Mini DAW
simpleDescription: Browser multi-track chop & EQ workspace.
description: Lightweight in-browser digital audio workstation: multi-track loading, region chops, stutter, A/B, per-track EQ & export mix/regions.

name: Wave Cutter
simpleDescription: Marker-based slicing & restoration EQ tool.
description: Interactive waveform editor: zoom, markers, multi-cut, parametric EQ node curve and basic restoration parameter staging (client-side).

name: EchoSharp Transcriber
simpleDescription: Near real-time style transcription (stub demo).
description: EchoSharp pipeline demo: uploads audio, simulates VAD + Whisper transcription and returns segmented transcript (placeholder until full .NET integration).
